name: STB — Deployment Webhook → Regression Gate
description: Called by CI/CD (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, etc.) after a CMS deployment. Runs the full regression suite and blocks the pipeline if tests fail by returning a non-200 status.

parameters.text:
🔄 *STB Regression Suite Started*

• Env: `{{ $('Parse Deploy Event').item.json.environment }}`
• Version: `{{ $('Parse Deploy Event').item.json.version }}`
• Deployed by: {{ $('Parse Deploy Event').item.json.deployed_by }}
• Commit: `{{ $('Parse Deploy Event').item.json.commit }}`

Running `{{ $('Parse Deploy Event').item.json.run_markers }}` tests with {{ $('Parse Deploy Event').item.json.workers }} workers...

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'APPROVED', verdict: $json.verdict, summary: $json.summary, run_id: $json.run_id, reason: $json.reason }) }}

parameters.text:
✅ *STB Regression Gate — APPROVED*

• Version: `{{ $json.deploy.version }}`
• Pass Rate: *{{ $json.summary.pass_pct }}%* (threshold: {{ $json.gate_threshold }}%)
• Total: {{ $json.summary.total }} | ✅ {{ $json.summary.passed }} | ❌ {{ $json.summary.failed }}
• Run ID: `{{ $json.run_id }}`

Deployment to `{{ $json.deploy.environment }}` is approved. 🚀

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'BLOCKED', verdict: $json.verdict, summary: $json.summary, run_id: $json.run_id, reason: $json.reason }) }}

parameters.text:
🚫 *STB Regression Gate — DEPLOYMENT BLOCKED*

• Version: `{{ $json.deploy.version }}`
• Reason: {{ $json.reason }}
• Pass Rate: {{ $json.summary.pass_pct }}% (need {{ $json.gate_threshold }}%+)
• Failed: {{ $json.summary.failed }} | Errors: {{ $json.summary.errors }}
• Run ID: `{{ $json.run_id }}`

📊 Full report: http://localhost:8501
🔗 Fix failures before re-deploying.
